title: Manager - Sales (Thailand)
description:
Position Title: Manager – Sales, Thailand, SEA
Position Location: Singapore, Required to travel in SEA
Direct supervisor: Senior Manager – Singapore
Direct reports: None, However, as business scales up this position may play wider role in the region
Collaboration: Regional Customers, Operations and execution team in Singapore and HQ, Regional Sales support team in HQ, Marketing, Innovation, Agronomy, partner research institutions, Industry conferences, etc to have a wholistic and deeper understanding of business.

Product Focus: TSP/TSP+/NPs and any other products under customized product portfolio.

JOB DESCRIPTION
Sales – Customization Products

1. Analysing market demand/supply, pricing Assessments, maintain regular interactions with customers and providing monthly forecast to the management.

a. Priority 1 markets –Thailand

b. Priority 2 markets – Rest of SEA/North Asia

2. Business development including identifying and contacting new potential customers, partners. Maintaining and building relationships with existing customers.

3. Customer onboarding, KYCs, and maintaining updated customer profiles.

4. Produce reliable demand forecasts for the regional customers – Monthly, Quarterly and Annual cycles.

5. Handling customer requests for samples and facilitating new product registration.

Operations and Execution Collaboration

1. Liaison with regional execution team on contracts, documentation, warehouse management of regional hub including – liaising with parties/agents/customers involved for import/export, trade documentation, freight handling, bagging, product inventory management and sales planning.

2. Develop deep understanding of the regional Phosphate market dynamics; including but not limited to supply chain dynamics, local Importers, Producer intermediaries and End Consumers, competitors and impact of commodity markets and global pricing index.

3. Develop relationships with key stakeholders – Commercial and Non-Commercial entities (e.g. local Importers, Producer intermediaries and End Consumers, Policy makers and relevant agencies – government and non-government.

Skills:

Bachelors/Master’s degree with a fertilizer industry background.

Minimum 5-8 years of Commercial Experience in SEA, with strong knowledge of Fertilizer ecosystem in SEA, with specific experience on Phosphate based fertilizers (Rock, DAP, MAP, TSP).

Language:

Proficiency in English is a must and Regional Language (Thai) capability will be an added advantage

postedCompany.name: OCP SINGAPORE SERVICES AND PRODUCTS PTE. LTD.
